privileged_info_summary: Verified the setup_task.sh and verifier.py scripts. Confirmed the task uses synthetically generated data injected via API calls to populate Snipe-IT users, locations, and hardware. Exactly matched the target users (aadams, bbaker, cclark), thin clients (TC-001, TC-002, TC-003), laptops (LAP-WFH-001, LAP-WFH-002, LAP-WFH-003), accessory (Jabra Evolve2 65), and location (Remote/WFH) from the task description and verifier logic.
